CREATE TABLE test_numbers (a INTEGER, b INTEGER);
SELECT fdiv(a, CASE WHEN b = 0 THEN NULL ELSE b END) AS division_result FROM test_numbers;
SELECT a, b, fdiv(a, b) AS result FROM test_numbers WHERE b != 0;
SELECT a, b, fdiv(fdiv(a, b), 2) AS half_division FROM test_numbers WHERE b != 0;
SELECT a, b, (SELECT fdiv(a, b) FROM test_numbers AS tn WHERE tn.a > 0 LIMIT 1) FROM test_numbers;
CREATE TABLE additional_values (x DOUBLE, y DOUBLE);
SELECT fdiv(tn.a, av.y) FROM test_numbers tn JOIN additional_values av ON tn.a > av.y;
SELECT fdiv(a, b) + 3 AS adjusted_division FROM test_numbers;
SELECT fdiv(a + 10, b - 1) AS complex_division FROM test_numbers WHERE b > 1;
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(fdiv(a, b) ORDER BY a) FROM test_numbers WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
